filesModified.purpose: Added openOnImageClick={false} and inlineSVG={true} to ImageDropUploader for the logo
Added openOnImageClick={false} to ImageDropUploader for the social icon placeholder

warnings: Pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs)

syncStatus.notes: Pre-existing false-positive warning on root wrapper mismatch (InspectorControls fragment vs section) — this is the standard pattern for all blocks in the theme

fixesApplied.change: Added openOnImageClick={false} to prevent clicking the logo image from opening the media library
Added inlineSVG={true} to render SVG logos inline in the editor (matching PHP side which uses theme_output_svg_or_img)
Added openOnImageClick={false} to prevent clicking the icon placeholder from opening the media library
